failures.name: Job application caller
failures.summary: The agent did not route the caller to the appropriate employment response.
failures.root_cause: The agent directed the caller to the website instead of providing a direct response or transfer for job inquiries.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. I'm interested in job openings for HVAC technician positions. Are there any available?
Thanks for reaching out! For job inquiries, the best path is through our website or by emailing the team directly. Can I get your name and the best contact number for follow-up?
Sure! My name is Alex, and my number is 555-1234.
Thank you, Alex. Just to confirm, I have your name as Alex and your number as 555-1234. Is that correct?
Perfect! I've noted your interest in job openings, and someone from our team will follow up with you soon. Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Job application caller
all_results.summary: The agent did not route the caller to the appropriate employment response.
all_results.root_cause: The agent directed the caller to the website instead of providing a direct response or transfer for job inquiries.

all_results.name: Service area dispute
all_results.summary: The agent did not confirm or deny the service area, captured the necessary information, and noted that the agent will confirm on callback.
